rows.label: tlk45300054_01_msg0001
rows.name:
The majority of Superbia's buildings
are built from salvaged machinery
and processed ores and minerals.

rows.label: tlk45300054_01_msg0002
rows.name:
We also make extensive use of
geothermally-powered steam engines.

rows.label: tlk45300054_01_msg0003
rows.name:
It's no exaggeration to say that
this is the most technologically
advanced city in all of Alst.

rows.label: tlk45300054_01_msg0004
rows.name:
I'm a mechanic supporting this
city, so I often climb onto roofs
to maintain the machinery.

rows.label: tlk45300054_01_msg0005
rows.name:
Sometimes I worry what would
happen if I fell off.
